text.title: guardrails-testing Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for guardrails-testing as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Running security tests with live LLM API calls in CI.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Live API calls in CI add cost, latency, and non-determinism. Mock the LLM client for unit and integration tests. Reserve live API tests for manual red-team sessions in staging.

failure-mode.description: Deploying guardrails without a false positive baseline measurement.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without a baseline, you cannot tell whether a guardrail configuration change improved or degraded precision. Measure false positive rate before and after every configuration change using a fixed representative sample.
